full_text:
Tissue was minced in small pieces and dissociated with: 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/step) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer, RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 1 ml of media and counted.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

1 vial of 1.3 E6 cells was frozen.

Cells were resuspended in 1 mL of STEMCELL Banker in each tube.

| | Dispase
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 1.66
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 1.19
 | viability [%] | 72.0
 | size [µm] | 9.0
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 1.01
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 0.782
 | viability [%] | 77.3
 | size [µm] | 10.3
Average | [cells/ml] | 1.335 E6

 | viability [%] | 74.65
